intentSynonyms: get a restaurant menu in pandaexpress
look up a restaurant menu in pandaexpress
fetch a single restaurant menu in pandaexpress
view one specific restaurant menu in pandaexpress
get menu for a panda express location in pandaexpress
description: Get the full menu for a specific Panda Express restaurant. Returns categories (e.g., "Bigger Plates", "Sides") with their products including name, description, price, and calories.
